title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
